scope: Where transformation must live to stay honest.
key_concepts: Cross-validation relies on rotating training and assessment folds. If features are engineered prior to execution, data leakage traverses across the rotating folds.
To remain statistically honest, the sequence of feature transformations must be bundled inside an encompassing execution pipeline.
The pipeline executes the fit function limited exclusively to the internal training fold, and runs the transform function against the validation fold independently per cycle.

definitions.definition: Metode evaluasi kinerja iteratif algoritma dengan menukar partisi bagian data observasi latih dan prediksi secara bergantian.
Satu segmen partisi himpunan dari skema irisan pecahan data yang dialokasikan di fase silang cross-validation.

examples: Imputing the mean of a feature inside cross-validation. The pipeline calculates a new mean at each fold using strictly that block's training points.
[KODE: a standard pipeline embedded inside cross_val_score showing standard scaler handling; sumber: notebook bab]
exclusions: Avoid going into grid search hyperparameter tuning, stay focused on feature transformation integrity inside CV.
